markers: ABPath_MicroDx_Clean.md contains the main educational case bank, algorithm steps, and diagnostic explanations
app_revamped.py is a Streamlit shell that renders the markdown content and navigation
No standalone lecture deck or image asset library was found
Playwright tests exist for keyboard navigation, but they are not educational source content

summary.notes: The repository is a Streamlit microbiology review app with a single large markdown knowledge file and a lightweight UI wrapper.

recommendation: Stage the markdown knowledge file first, then separate the case-bank algorithms from the wrapper app during normalization. No lecture or image corpus is present to migrate.
